data.content:
Plan summary for the reviewer / next step (plan_review):

Approach: additive promotion of verification steps to a first-class
`Vec<String>` field. New schema migration v19 adds
`verification_steps_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`. New event kind
`KnotVerificationStepsSet` carries the full list on each change. New CLI
flags: `kno new --verification-step` (repeatable) and `kno update`
`--add-verification-step` / `--remove-verification-step` /
`--clear-verification-steps`. `kno show` renders the list and JSON always
emits the `verification_steps` key (empty array by default).

Sub-module structure: list management lives in
`src/app/knot_update/fields.rs::collect_verification_steps`, mirroring
`collect_invariants`. Create-path mirrors the optional acceptance event
emission. Rehydration replaces the projection's list on each event.

File-size budget: `write_queue.rs` (499) and `ui.rs` (493) sit at the
500-line ceiling. Plan extracts queue IO plumbing to
`src/write_queue/io.rs` and (if needed) ui show-field helpers to
`src/ui/show_fields.rs` before adding the new fields.

Risk surface: schema migration is forward-only with safe default; coverage
gate (95%) requires new tests mirroring the invariants tests; the
`make sanity` step enforces formatting, clippy, file-size script, tests,
and coverage.

Out of scope: updating `skills/knots_create.md` (the skill still mentions
verification under `-d`) — follow-up.
